name: pi-gui-extension
description: Pi extension for a localhost multi-session web UI.
author: Ankit Chouhan (https://github.com/ankitchouhan1020)

scripts.dev: npm run dev:web & npm run dev:server
scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "await import('./server/hub.js'); await import('./server/http.js'); await import('./server/sse-protocol.js'); console.log('smoke ok')"
scripts.test: npm run smoke && node --test server/stabilize.test.js server/sse-protocol.test.js server/http.contract.test.js server/skill-workspace.test.js server/test-temp.test.js && node --experimental-strip-types --test web/src/lib/chat-stream.test.ts web/src/lib/special-message.test.ts web/src/lib/tool-presentation.test.ts web/src/lib/work-section.test.ts extensions/gui.test.ts
